title: melaleuca aestiva
intro: Melaleuca aestiva, also known as the 'Snow-in-Summer', is a small, shrub-like plant native to South Africa, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Melaleuca aestiva include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Melaleuca aestiva include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
